overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy industrial waterfront district at night in a cyberpunk video game setting. The camera moves steadily along concrete promenades past digital billboards, illuminated smokestacks, and towering industrial structures with red neon lighting, creating a dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial walkway with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered industrial walkway beside a water canal, passing large digital billboards

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying truck advertisement with text 'GET LARGER'
rectangular water channel with metal railings and reflective surface
industrial yellow seating against the wall beneath the billboards
safety railing along the edge of the water canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered industrial walkway with large digital billboards on the left wall and a water canal on the right. The environment is artificially lit with a warm orange glow, and the concrete walkway stretches forward through the foggy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with industrial skyline

events.description: exits covered walkway into open foggy waterfront area with visible industrial smokestacks

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade as the space opens up to reveal the industrial harbor

entered.detail: tall factory chimneys emitting smoke into the foggy night sky
industrial docking platforms with overhead canopies and lighting
wide concrete walkway running parallel to the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront promenade shrouded in thick fog. Industrial smokestacks rise in the distant background while dock structures line the right side. The atmosphere is desolate and dystopian, with red warning lights visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock area with towering neon-lit structures

agents.ego_description: walking toward a massive cylindrical tower with red neon lighting, passing under metal gantries

entered.detail: massive cylindrical industrial tower with horizontal red neon rings and warning lights
overhead metal structure with red warning lights spanning the walkway
low-rise industrial structures adjacent to the red tower

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a dominant red neon-lit tower on the left side of the walkway. Overhead gantries with red warning lights span the path, and the industrial dock structures become more detailed as the fog slightly clears.

events.description: slight camera turn as walkway curves toward the gate entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a dark industrial gate structure, preparing to enter the enclosed area ahead

entered.detail: large dark entrance structure with metal framework marking the tunnel entry
low concrete dividers along the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a dark industrial gate at the end of the waterfront promenade. The red neon tower has passed behind on the left, and the environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera nears the tunnel entrance, with overhead gantries now prominent in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy industrial waterfront that shifts from a warm, artificially lit walkway into a dark, oppressive industrial corridor. It begins along a semi-covered concrete path flanked by glowing digital billboards and a quiet water canal under a warm orange light. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens into a desolate waterfront promenade where thick fog obscures distant smokestacks and red warning lights flicker in the gloom. The scene then shifts toward a dominant red neon-lit tower on the left, passing under overhead gantries as the fog slightly clears to reveal the detailed structures of the industrial docks. Finally, the camera leaves the neon glow behind and enters a darker, more enclosed space, approaching a heavy industrial gate and a tunnel entrance.
